title: rubus psilander
intro: Rubus psilander, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of ellagic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus psilander include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health, as well as its antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus psilander include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make jams, jellies, and other culinary products.
